God was "King of Israel." The two functions of the king mentioned in 1 Sam. 8:20, i.e., judging (being the lawgiver) and commanding the armed forces, had always belonged to the Lord. When Israel had been in danger of being driven into the Red Sea by an Egyptian force bent on renewing Israel's subjugation, Moses delivered the authoritative message: "Fear ye not, stand still, and see the salvation…
